long_description:
Coles Australian Sunmuscat Sultanas 400g


  • Product of Australia
  • Sweet rich muscat flavour
  • No artificial colours and flavours


These Coles Australian Sunmuscat Sultanas are naturally sweet, premium sultanas with a plump and juicy texture. They're made from the Sunmuscat grape variety which is unique to Australia, and grown in the Sunraysia region in Northwest Victoria. Coles Australian Sunmuscat Sultanas are carefully ripened and dried on the vine, nourished by the Murray River, then harvested at their peak, giving them a naturally rich muscat flavour, golden coloured hue and plump body.


Coles Australian Sunmuscat Sultanas are the perfect sweet snack or accompaniment to any cheeseboard. Use them as is, they're delicious straight from the pack, or cover them with water for 10-15 minutes to rehydrate before adding to your baking, salads and rice dishes. They make a great addition to spiced saffron basmati rice alongside toasted almond slivers, cashews and caramelised onion, finished with fresh coriander and dill. Or elevate plain vanilla ice cream by mixing in Coles Australian Sunmuscat Sultanas, brown sugar and mixed spice.
name: Australian Sunmuscat Sultanas

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Potato, Egg and Bacon Salad 350g

  • Carisma potatoes, egg and bacon in a creamy dressing
  • Ready to eat
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. This Coles Kitchen Potato, Egg and Bacon Salad is a delicious deli-style salad made with Carisma potatoes which have a low GI rating and less carbohydrates than regular potatoes. Finished with egg, bacon, seeded mustard, spring onion and chives in a creamy mustard mayonnaise dressing, it's the perfect side for any meal. All you need to do is stir and serve. Coles Kitchen Potato, Egg and Bacon Salad is ready to eat and contains no artificial colours and flavours and has 2.5 serves of vegetables per pack. And with the taste that everyone loves it's sure to be a hit at your next barbeque or get-together with friends. Serve Coles Kitchen Potato, Egg and Bacon Salad alongside grilled meat or fish with a green salad and some garlic bread for the perfect any time lunch or dinner.

long_description: A crunchy traditional coleslaw blend of cabbage and carrot. Add a good drizzle of coleslaw dressing and toss well for an easy instant side dish. Perfect as a side salad, on a burger at a barbecue or in your weekly Mexican meal. MAKE IT YOUR OWN: For a healthy twist on a coleslaw classic, toss with yoghurt, lemon juice and black pepper. Combine with cranberries, flaked almonds, mayonnaise and a squeeze of lime for a creamy coleslaw. To create a zesty twist, add shaved fennel, organge segments and drizzle with olive oil.
name: Coleslaw

description: COLES KITCHEN JULIENNE CUT VEGETABLE STIR FRY 300G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Capsicum (24%), Cabbage (20%), Carrot (17%), Zucchini (17%), Onion (12%), Bok Choy (10%).
long_description:
Coles Kitchen Julienne Vegetables Stir Fry 300g

  • 100% Australian grown
  • Washed and ready to cook
  • 5-star health rating

Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. Coles Kitchen Julienne Vegetables Stir Fry contains a mix of thinly sliced fresh Australian vegetables including capsicum, cabbage, carrot, zucchini, onion and bok choy, washed and ready to cook. Helping you get dinner sorted, fast. Coles Kitchen Julienne Vegetables Stir Fry can be used to create a range of tasty meals by combining with rice or noodles and adding your favourite protein.

Chicken, beef and pork all work well, or you can use crispy fried tofu instead of meat to create a delicious vegetarian option. You can build even more flavour into your dish by adding your favourite stir fry sauce and a sprinkling of chopped spring onions and chilli flakes. And with 4 serves of vegetables and no artificial colours and flavours, Coles Kitchen Julienne Vegetables Stir Fry is a great choice for the whole family.
name: Kitchen Julienne Cut Vegetable Stir Fry

description: COLES KITCHEN ASIAN STYLE VEGETABLE STIR FRY 300G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Cabbage (30%), Carrot (22%), Bok Choy (17%), Broccolini® (13%), Spring Onion (10%), Snap Peas (8%).Ingredients and percentages may vary due to processing and seasonal variability
long_description:
Coles Asian Style Vegetables Stir Fry 300g

  • 100% Australian grown
  • Washed and ready to cook
  • 5-star health rating

Coles Asian Style Vegetables Stir Fry contains a vibrant mix of freshly cut Australian vegetables including cabbage, carrot, bok choy, broccolini, spring onion and snap peas. All washed and ready to cook to help you get dinner on the table, fast. You can use Coles Asian Style Vegetables Stir Fry to create a range of meals by combining with noodles or rice and adding your favourite protein. like diced chicken, beef or pork. Or you can create a vegetarian option by swapping out the meat for crispy fried tofu. You can build even more flavour into your dish with a sprinkling of chopped spring onions, chilli flakes and sesame seeds, or your favourite stir fry sauce. Coles Asian Style Vegetables Stir Fry helps dinner come together in minutes and with 4 serves of vegetables and no artificial colours and flavours, it's a great choice for the whole family.
name: Kitchen Asian Style Vegetable Stir Fry

long_description:
Gourmet Garden Lightly Dried Coriander is made with Australian grown coriander that is roughly chopped and lightly dried (just enough) for fresher flavour that lasts for 4 weeks once opened*. Our Aussie farmers grow coriander on broad-acre farms in Biloela Queensland, where the warm, subtropical climate and rich soil delivers the perfect conditions for flavoursome, aromatic herbs.

Gourmet Garden Lightly Dried Coriander is best added at the end of your cooking and is ideal in Mexican and Indian dishes. Think salads, tacos, rice and salsas.

  • Refreshes in cooking, unlocking intense flavours
  • Delicious sprinkled over stir fries, curries and tacos

(*Fresh for 4 weeks refers to the flavour and aroma being maintained for 4 weeks upon opening on or before the best before date.)


Our Story

At Gourmet Garden, we are passionate about making fresh herbs and spices easy for everyday cooking. Our herbs stay fresh for four weeks* once opened, with no waste so you can have a 'herb garden' ready when you are every day.

Put simply, your Gourmet Garden herbs and spices are:

  • Australian grown
  • Washed, chopped & prepped within 24hrs of leaving the farm
  • Pre-prepared and ready to use
  • Closest to the same look, taste & aroma of fresh herbs and spices

The herbs are cared for, fed and are grown by our dedicated group of farmers who are truly passionate about producing fresh herbs that are teaming with essential oils, the key to unlocking flavour, aroma and colourful herbs. Years of research has been invested into finding the optimum conditions and care for each variety of herb.

(*Fresh for 4 weeks refers to the flavour and aroma being maintained for 4 weeks upon opening on or before the best before date.)
name: Lightly Dried Coriander

long_description:
Gourmet Garden Chilli Paste is made with vibrant chillies, grown by Aussie farmers on broad-acre farms in Queensland, where with warm subtropical climate and rich soil delivers the perfect conditions for flavoursome, aromatic spices. The chillies are harvested when the essential oils (that's the flavour, colour and aroma) are at their peak and then transported within 18 hours of harvest to our Palmwoods factory where they are washed, chopped and cold blended for fresher flavour that lasts for 4 weeks*.

Chilli Cold Blended Paste is great for those of us who like it a little spicy (but not too hot!) and hate chilli fingers! Chilli can be added at the beginning of your cooking to infuse the flavour base throughout the rest of your cooking and towards the end for a sharper flavour. Chilli suits most cuisines but particularly pairs well with Asian curries, marinades and sauces. In cooking, for medium heat use 1 teaspoon of chilli paste and for hot heat use 1 tablespoon of chilli paste.


- Chilli without the prep and hassle of chilli fingers


- Made with Australian grown chilli


- Fresher flavour that lasts for 4 weeks once opened*.


- In cooking, for medium heat use 1 teaspoon of chilli paste and for hot heat use 1 tablespoon of chilli paste


- Delicious stirred into stir fries, dressings and pasta sauces


(*Fresh for 4 weeks refers to the flavour and aroma being maintained for 4 weeks upon opening on or before the best before date.)


Our Story

At Gourmet Garden, we are passionate about making fresh herbs and spices easy for everyday cooking. Our herbs stay fresh for four weeks* once opened, with no waste so you can have a 'herb garden' ready when you are every day.


Put simply, your Gourmet Garden herbs and spices are:


- Australian, organically grown (where possible) herbs


- Washed, chopped & prepped within 18hrs of harvesting


- Made with no preservatives, pesticides or nasty stuff


- Pre-prepared and ready to use


- Closest to the same look, taste & aroma of fresh herbs and spices

(*Fresh for 4 weeks refers to the flavour and aroma being maintained for 4 weeks upon opening on or before the best before date.)

No artificial colours or flavours!

long_description:
Swisse Ultiboost Vitamin D is a premium quality formula that maintains healthy bones and teeth, bone density supports the absorption of dietary calcium, and maintains immune system health and function. Vitamin D is produced by the body when it's exposed to sunlight, however inadequate sun exposure can sometimes mean our body's vitamin D levels are low - in fact, nearly one quarter of Australian adults are deficient in vitamin D*. This supplement contains 25 micrograms of vitamin D3, which is retained in the bloodstream more effectively when compared to vitamin D2 (a synthetic form). 

*Australian Health Survey: Biomedical Results for Nutrients, 2011-12
  • Supports strong, healthy bones and teeth.

  • Helps increase dietary calcium absorption.

  • Supports muscle health.

  • Maintains a healthy immune system.

  • Naturally derived source of vitamin D3.

long_description:
This tasty orange-flavoured Cenovis Chewable Mega C 1000mg contains high strength Vitamin C to help support healthy immune system function and relieve the severity and duration of common cold symptoms. Plus, it also supports formation of collagen, supports wound healing and acts as an antioxidant to reduce free radicals formed in the body - all of that in one daily chewable.

Proudly Australian Made by Cenovis, trusted by Australian families for over 85 years, Cenovis Chewable Mega C 1000mg are quality tested during manufacturing to ensure product consistency and potency. Cenovis Chewable Mega C 1000mg contain no added gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, dairy products or animal-derived products.*

Adults: chew 1 tablet daily or as recommended by your healthcare provider. Chew before swallowing. Not to be used by children under 2 years of age without medical advice. If symptoms persist, see your healthcare professional. Vitamin supplements should not replace a balanced diet. Always read label and follow the directions for use. *Contains: saccharin, sugars, sulfites, and sodium (83mg/tablet).

  • COLD SYMPTOM RELIEF: Helps to relieve the severity of common cold symptoms, as well as reduces the duration

  • IMMUNITY SUPPORT: Daily intake of Vitamin C provides support for healthy immune system function

  • COLLAGEN FORMATION: supports collagen formation, and wound healing

  • CHEWABLE TABLET: A convenient alternative to swallowing pills with a tasty orange flavor

  • NO ADDED: Gluten, lactose, artificial flavours, dairy products, or animal-derived products*

  • Always read the label and follow the directions for use. See product warnings below..
name: Mega Vitamin C 1000mg Tablets For Immunity

ingredients: Each chewable tablet contains: Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C) 250mg Sodium Ascorbate 281mg Equiv. to Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C) 250mg Total Vitamin C 500mg
long_description:
For Cold & Flu Symptoms: Vitamin C reduces severity and duration of common colds and flu symptoms. The body does not produce Vitamin C, so regular intake of Vitamin C can be beneficial.
Immune function: Vitamin C can assist in supporting a healthy immune system to fight illness.
Wound healing: Vitamin C can assist in wound healing and tissue repair.
Iron absorption: Vitamin C may assist the body with the absorption of dietary iron.
Antioxidant: Occasional alcohol consumption, UV light exposure and pollution may generate free radicals in the body. The antioxidant action of Vitamin C helps reduce these free radicals.
Collagen formation: Vitamin C is an essential nutrient to support the production of collagen in the body.

long_description:
Having trouble falling asleep because of stress? Nature's Own Magnesium + Sleep Tablets is convenient 1-a-day magnesium supplement which dissolves easily in water for an effervescent lemon balm flavoured drink that tastes great. Each tablet is specially formulated with 320mg Magnesium (from Magnesium Carbonate Hydrate) and 2.5mg Passionflower extract (from 250mg dry flower) and is traditionally used in Western herbal medicine to relieve sleeplessness associated with stress and decrease feelings of restlessness. This mineral and herbal supplement also helps relieve muscle cramps when dietary intake of magnesium is inadequate. Adults take one tablet daily, dissolved in 200mL of water, or as recommended by your healthcare professional, for a lemon balm-flavoured effervescent drink that tastes great. If symptoms persist, see your healthcare professional. Always read the label and follow the directions for use. Australian Made, and rigorously tested to ensure quality, potency, and purity, Nature's Own Magnesium + Sleep Tablets are 99% sugar free and contain no added gluten, lactose, artificial colours, artificial flavours, dairy products, or animal-derived products*.

* Contains sodium (202.25mg per tablet), sucralose, soya bean, sulfites.
  • FOR SLEEP: Passionflower is traditionally used in Western herbal medicine as a sleep aid to help relieve stress-related sleeplessness

Berocca Immune Daily Defence is an advanced triple action formula containing vitamin C, D and Zinc that strengthens your immunity all year round. It is scientifically formulated with a high dose of vitamin C (1000 mg), vitamin D and zinc to strengthen all three layers of the immune system and support your body's daily immune defences.
It helps reduce the occurrence of the common cold and helps decrease the severity and duration of common cold symptoms. When used daily, it helps the immune system all year round and at the first sign of common colds and flu.
Contains high dose Vitamin C (1000 mg) to support your body's natural defences. Our bodies cannot make Vitamin C or store large amounts of Vitamin C so you may need additional support.
Vitamin D to support immune cell function
Zinc to support antibody production
It has a delicious and refreshing fruity Orange flavour and is available in an effervescent format which is faster absorbing than a tablet. It contains no added artificial colours or aspartame.

long_description:
Berocca supports your energy so you can be at your best in whatever daily challenges you're facing. Berocca is the most studied multivitamin in the world: backed by 7 clinical studies1-7 showing improved energy for mind and body.

Whether you have a busy day ahead or are studying for exams, Berocca is a little drop of positivity to help you feel at your best. Switch ON with Berocca!

The formula of magnesium, zinc, calcium, vitamin C and all eight B vitamins helps release energy from your food, reduces tiredness and supports physical and mental stamina*.

Features and benefits
- Energy multivitamin with B vitamins which work together to release energy from your food
- Great tasting delicious, fruity berry flavour
- Helps support immune defence. Contains vitamin C and zinc to support your immune system
- Helps improve alertness and concentration
- Helps improve physical stamina* and reduce tiredness
- Helps enhance mental performance
- Only 6 - 8 calories per serve
- Improves energy without relying on a sugar or caffeine hit
- Vegan friendly: Berocca is not manufactured with ingredients derived from animal origin
- Intended for everyday use: our clinical studies show that Berocca works best when taken daily for 28 days.

- 8 in 10 would recommend it for energy
- 7 in 10 reported having more energy in the morning
- 7 in 10 reported having more energy in the afternoon
- 9 in 10 said they felt healthy

The benefits of kava are widely recognised as a natural solution which has been used traditionally in Pacific Islander and Western herbal medicine for centuries.

Our instant Noble Kava possesses specific levels of kavalactones that  have been scientifically researched, to assist to calm and soothe nerves, promote mind relaxation, support muscle relaxation and assist sleep. 

Used for these specific benefits or socially, as a non-alcoholic drink, for its relaxing effects.

Non-Alcoholic, Vegan , Product of Fiji.

This premium quality formula comes in a great tasting, orange flavoured powder which is 97% sugar free and naturally sweetened with monk fruit and stevia. Swisse Ultiboost Magnesium + Sleep Powder is a thoughtfully formulated product designed to support restful sleep and muscle relaxation. Containing a blend of calcium, potassium and magnesium to relieve muscle cramps and spasms helps ensure a comfortable rest. Its delightful lemon and honey flavour enhances the experience, while the inclusion of traditional western medicinal herbs hops and passionflower aids in achieving a calm state conducive to sleep. This powder is a convenient alternative to traditional tablets, offering a comprehensive solution for restful sleep and emotional balance.

  • Contains hops and passionflower traditionally used in western herbal medicine for sleep support

  • 300 mg of magnesium per serving

  • Powder format as an alternative to tablets
